components.value: V, S, M/DF (a pinch of earth)

description.value: You evoke a powerful light that affects all sighted creatures that do not posses light sensitivity. Those that succeed on their saves are dazzled for 1 round per level; those who fail are blinded for the same duration. Section 15: Copyright Notice Pathfinder Player Companion: Kobolds of Golarion.
